title: IQVIA A Smart Choice In A High-Inflation Environment
text: IQVIA has the potential to outperform the market in a higher inflation environment. Significant growth potential with projected 17.72% FCF and 11.68% EBIT CAGR over the next 5 years.

title: IQVIA (IQV) Beats on Q1 Earnings & Revenues, Tweaks '22 View
text: IQVIA's (IQV) first-quarter 2022 earnings and revenues increase year over year.

title: IQVIA Holdings Inc.'s (IQV) CEO Ari Bousbib on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: IQVIA Holdings Inc. (NYSE:IQV ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 27, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Nick Childs - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations and Corporate Communications Ari Bousbib - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Ron Bruehlman - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Mike Fedock - Senior Vice President, Financial Planning and Analysis Conference Call Participants Eric Coldwell - Baird Shlomo Rosenbaum - Stifel Nicolaus Jack Meehan - Nephron John Sourbeer - UBS Luke Sergott - Barclays Patrick Donnelly - Citi Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. At this time, I would like to welcome everyone to the IQVIA First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: 3 Technology Services Stocks to Watch Despite Industry Challenges
text: The coronavirus-driven dependency on technology, increased digitization and growing adoption of the multi-cloud model should help the Zacks Technology Services industry thrive. IQV, BCOR and AQUA are well-positioned to witness a demand surge.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Stock For Now
text: IQVIA (IQV) has a growing client base, along with the ability to standardize, organize and integrate its enormous treasure trove of data.
